description:
Worst-buried-fresh-node-recommendation-ever followup. Wave 117's sidecar staged BT2-012 + BT2-013 Vegito as the next Mr. Nodeley fresh-node candidate. I walked the corpus, found the staging was structurally incorrect — there is already an unambiguous BBL precedent for fusion-warrior treatment that does NOT require a fresh node, and Mr. Nodeley would have overreached. Specifically: the Gotenks Fusion-Dance prints (BT1-071 + BT2-015 + BT4-034) are canonically dual-anchored at [[son-goten]] AND [[trunks]] as a 'Gotenks: Fusion-Dance combined-form (Goten-half-of-fusion register)' aspect-grouping per the canonical Fusion-Dance-combined-character anchor pattern documented in son-goten.md's Caveats. Each Gotenks card carries `characters: [son-goten, trunks]` frontmatter; both parent nodes list the cards in their appears_on; both parent nodes treat Gotenks as a register-of-each-parent rather than a separate node. The precedent maps directly to Vegito-as-register-of-Goku-and-Vegeta. Edgelord steps in, Mr. Nodeley apologizes for the inconvenience.

The move: N:1 stack-attach. BT2-012 Repeated Force Vegito (vision+trivia+IP-verified, qty 1, Super Rare BT2 inclusion that BT2-005 SS Goku's own trivia documents as the Union Force red-archetype Buu-Saga payoff fusion) anchors a brand-new fifth aspect on vegeta.md: 'Vegito: Potara-Fusion combined-form (Vegeta-half-of-fusion register).' The aspect bullet leans entirely on BT2-012's own trivia bullets and Dragon Ball Wiki canon — Buu-Saga Elder Kai earring formation, the canonical Goku-intends-to-fuse-with-Gohan-but-Buu-absorbs-Gohan formation circumstance, the Daizenshuu 7 rival-boost-stronger-than-Fusion-Dance power profile, the Super-Buu-fought-with-only-feet dominance beat, the Vegito-de-fused-inside-Buu's-body anomaly retroactively explained by Dragon Ball Super, the canonical Potara-gi-distinct-from-Metamoran-vest visual identifier, and the Vegito-vs-Gogeta canonical Potara-vs-Fusion-Dance disambiguation. No canon invented.

Files touched: BT2-012 got `characters: [son-goku, vegeta]` frontmatter (was empty) plus a fresh `## Connections` section pointing at vegeta.md (with Goku mirror noted as staged for next pass); vegeta.md got the new Potara-Fusion aspect-grouping inserted after the SS-Blue / At All Costs aspect, the post-aspects paragraph upgraded from 'three distinct narrative phases' to 'four distinct registers' with the Vegito framing added, appears_on extended by the BT2-012 path, the auto-generated Appears-on section extended by `[[bt2-012-repeated-force-vegito]]`, the Future Discrete Lair Caveat upgraded from 5+1 to 6+1 enriched/unenriched + 12 to 13 total inventory + 6 to 7 prints + four-register-thesis-stack framing, the body-sync-status Caveat upgraded to reflect the new wave-118 attach and the staged Goku mirror pending, and a fresh dedicated Caveat written for the Vegito-Potara-Fusion-dual-anchor-pattern-precedent-from-Gotenks-Fusion-Dance plus the staged BT2-013 stub deferral. The Goku-side mirror attach is staged for the next Edgelord pass; per swarm-staggering / one-anchor-per-invocation, the symmetric move (extend son-goku.md's appears_on by BT2-012, add a Vegito Potara-Fusion register aspect-grouping to son-goku.md's body, update son-goku.md's auto-section, refresh son-goku.md's Caveats with the dual-anchor precedent) is held for the next wave.

Mr. Nodeley refusal: BT2-012 + BT2-013 Vegito does NOT warrant a fresh `vegito.md` character node at this corpus density. The 3-Gotenks-print precedent at [[son-goten]] / [[trunks]] has been carrying the fusion-warrior treatment under the parent-character dual-anchor pattern for waves; the Vegito case is structurally identical at 1-enriched-print + 1-stub-print. A future split is defensible if the Vegito-print corpus density grows past the Gotenks-print-density threshold (currently 3 prints all enriched, no solo split commissioned); the deferral logic mirrors the parent-node solo-character-split deferral pattern that vegeta.md's own first Caveat documents.
citations: [cards/_characters/son-goten.md — Caveats: 'The Gotenks Fusion-Dance prints' dual-anchor across [[son-goten]] and [[trunks]]' — precedent for the Fusion-combined-character dual-anchor pattern]
[cards/_characters/trunks.md — appears_on enumerates BT1-071 + BT2-015 + BT4-034 Gotenks prints — sibling dual-anchor reference]

[Dragon Ball Wiki: Vegito] — primary character page for the Potara-Fusion combined-character; canonical reference for the Goku-Vegeta-Potara-fusion formation circumstance, the Buu-Saga arc context, and the Potara-vs-Fusion-Dance canonical disambiguation against Gogeta
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Fusion Dance] — canonical reference for the Metamoran-vest-distinct-from-Potara-gi visual identifier
[CBR: 'Vegito: Dragon Ball's Weirdest and Most Powerful Body Fusion, Explained'] — already cited in BT2-012's trivia for the formation-circumstance backstory
[Daizenshuu 7, cited via WebSearch snippet] — already cited in BT2-012's trivia for the Potara-fusion-stronger-than-Fusion-Dance power-profile and the rival-boost amplification

BT2-012's own four trivia bullets — Potara-vs-Fusion canonical disambiguation, formation circumstances, power profile, de-fusion anomaly — independently established the canonical Vegito-as-Goku-and-Vegeta-component-personality framing before this Edgelord attach

BT2-005 Super Saiyan Son Goku trivia (already in corpus) — explicitly documents the Union Force red-archetype as 'centered on Majin Vegeta and the Vegito fusion mechanic: Son Goku and Vegeta cards are stacked to summon Lightning Speed Vegito (BT2-013), the archetype payoff' — independent confirmation of Bandai's designer-coordinated Vegito-as-red-archetype-payoff card-game-design intent
other_candidates_considered: BT2-012 + BT2-013 Vegito fresh-node Mr. Nodeley proposal (wave 117's staged recommendation) — refused. The fusion-warrior treatment precedent at son-goten.md + trunks.md for the 3-Gotenks-print cohort has been operating for waves under the dual-anchor-of-parent-characters pattern. Promoting Vegito to a solo node at 1-enriched-print + 1-stub-print density would be a Nodeley overreach that violates the Potion Rule's sub-rule 4 (don't promote pattern-instance to new structural-primitive when the existing pattern handles the case). The Gotenks precedent's own Caveat explicitly states a future gotenks.md solo-split is 'deferred until the corpus density of Gotenks-prints alone (currently three) warrants the split' — the Vegito case is BELOW that threshold and gets the same deferral logic. Structural cleanup, not fresh node.

Gotenks fresh-node Mr. Nodeley pass (the stronger Nodeley case at first glance) — refused on the same grounds. Three Gotenks corpus prints, all vision+trivia+IP-verified, all already correctly dual-anchored at son-goten.md AND trunks.md with explicit aspect-grouping and appears_on enumeration. The structural work is done; promoting Gotenks to a solo node at this stage would just relocate the canonical-source documentation without adding query power that the dual-anchor pattern doesn't already provide. Deferred until per-Gotenks-print corpus density grows or a Gotenks-themed Discrete Lair commission lands.

BT2-013 Lightning Speed Vegito body-attach — blocked. Card is corpus-prep-only: empty `tags_hub`, empty `tags_filter`, no `## Vision` or `## Trivia` body content, no `suspected_ip` field. Vision-pass blocker. Frontmatter wiring deferred until trivia-pass lands per the trunks / son-goku enriched-anchors-only precedent. Will clear the second Vegito Potara-Fusion register print position once the vision queue catches up.

[[son-goku]] mirror attach for BT2-012 Repeated Force Vegito — structurally required next-pass work. The Goku-side aspect-grouping bullet, appears_on insertion, auto-section refresh, and Caveats note all follow the same template applied at vegeta.md this wave. Reserved for next Edgelord invocation per swarm-staggering. The Goku-side will likely also need to acknowledge the canonical Goku-half-of-Potara-fusion register where Vegito's body-and-aura visibly carries Goku's blue gi and Goku's Kamehameha access (Vegito uses both Kamehameha and Galick Gun canonically per Dragon Ball Wiki, encoding the dual-component-personality at the technique-access layer).

TB2-025 Begrudging Respect Vegeta body-attach — still blocked. Card is vision-passed only; trivia + IP-verification still outstanding. Frontmatter has characters: [vegeta] stamped but body-bullet write-up is deferred until trivia-pass lands per the trunks / son-goku enriched-anchors-only precedent. Disposition unchanged from wave 116 and wave 117 sidecars.

BT2 Union Force unwired list per the wave-114 through wave-117 carry-forwards (BT2-018 Videl, BT2-052 Yajirobe, BT2-061 Gowasu, BT2-115 Salza) — unchanged disposition. None are unwired anchors on already-existing nodes in the same one-pass-fix sense BT2-012 was. Each would require either a Mr. Nodeley fresh-node pass or node-density-threshold satisfaction; all sit at 1-corpus-print density below the multi-aspect parent-node threshold.

Krillin <-> Android 18, Jace <-> Liliana, Chandra <-> Bolas, Gideon <-> Liliana character-to-character relations — still parked behind the 'defer character-to-character edge pending framework formalization' rule from the wave-71 krillin commission note. Same disposition as waves 115-117.

Single Strike mechanic character/cycle character-layer node — still flagged in waves 115-117 as a Mr. Nodeley candidate; the symbol-layer single-strike-emblem.md already does the structural work via appears_on. Not Edgelord's call until the layer-sibling question is decided.
